name: Power Vacuum
short_description: Power Vacuum is a fast-paced, competitive strategy game. It aims for minimalism, stripping away all the unnecessary detail to let you play as fast as you can. Power Vacuum features a “play against your past self” system that automatically records the games you (and your friends!) play.
detailed_description:
Power Vacuum is a fast-paced, competitive strategy game.
It aims for minimalism, stripping away all the unnecessary detail to let you play as fast as you can.
Unlike other games in its category, Power Vacuum features a “play against your past self” system that automatically records the games you (and your friends!) play. The recorded moves are then replayed by bots in subsequent games.

CHOOSE A STRATEGY

Outgrow your opponents. Steal their colonies. Collect taxes. The choice is yours.

GROW COLONIES

Buy colonies throughout the galaxy and grow them to expand your influence.
To grow a colony, place and connect stations. The more stations you connect, the greater the influence of that colony.
Make progress as fast as you can! Power Vacuum is free from unnecessary tedium and lets you have it your way.

PLAY AGAINST YOUR PAST SELF

Power Vacuum automatically records the games you play and bots replay them in subsequent games.

ON YOUR OWN OR WITH FRIENDS

You can play exclusively against bots or play with your friends over a LAN.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
